recommendations.title: Dogman
recommendations.overview: A boy, bruised by life, finds his salvation through the love of his dogs.

recommendations.title: Léon: The Professional
recommendations.overview: Léon, the top hit man in New York, has earned a rep as an effective "cleaner". But when his next-door neighbors are wiped out by a loose-cannon DEA agent, he becomes the unwilling custodian of 12-year-old Mathilda. Before long, Mathilda's thoughts tu

recommendations.title: The Fifth Element
recommendations.overview: In 2257, a taxi driver is unintentionally given the task of saving a young girl who is part of the key that will ensure the survival of humanity.

recommendations.title: Angel-A
recommendations.overview: A beautiful and mysterious woman helps an inept scam artist get his game together... but is their meeting purely coincidence?

recommendations.title: The Lady
recommendations.overview: The story of Aung San Suu Kyi as she becomes the core of Burma's democracy movement, and her relationship with her husband, writer Michael Aris.

recommendations.title: Nikita
recommendations.overview: A beautiful felon, sentenced to life in prison for the murder of a policeman, is given a second chance – as a secret political assassin controlled by the government.

recommendations.title: Arthur and the Revenge of Maltazard
recommendations.overview: Arthur answers a distress call from Princess Selenia, who is menaced by the nefarious Maltazard.

recommendations.title: Anna
recommendations.overview: Beneath Anna Poliatova's striking beauty lies a secret that will unleash her indelible strength and skill to become one of the world's most feared government assassins.

recommendations.title: Arthur 3: The War of the Two Worlds
recommendations.overview: With Maltazard now seven feet tall and Arthur still two inches small, our hero must find a way to grow back to his normal size and stop the Evil M once and for all, with the help of Selenia and Betameche.

recommendations.title: Subway
